name: foundation-integrity
description: A foundation gate and transparent coworker policy that prevent locally-correct features from cementing weak architecture, with a pinned Matt Pocock workflow companion and preconfigured repo conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Audit the foundation before building on it
interface.longDescription: A standalone foundation gate, adversarial review, health audit, and transparent coworker policy, distributed with a commit-pinned Matt Pocock workflow companion and separate Claude/Codex standalone skill projections.
defaultPrompt: Audit the foundation before designing this feature.
Challenge this foundation receipt in an independent session.
Review cumulative foundation health and rank the repair backlog.
